applicability_notes: Elementwise unary rounding op; maps 1:1 to torch.ceil. Golden registered via unary golden dispatch table: 'ceil': torch.ceil. Fusable into preceding/following eltwise chains as a unary SFPU op (e.g. via unary op chain / fused activation slots on matmul or binary ops). Float dtypes only meaningful (integer ceil is identity).

placement_observations.source: test_unary_ceil: ttnn.from_torch(in_data1, dtype=ttnn.float32, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory_config
test_unary_ceil: output produced with default memory_config (DRAM interleaved), no explicit output_mem_config passed
